# discord_bans (Data Source)

Fetches the bans of a Discord guild (server). Returns a single page of up to 1000 bans; it does not paginate further.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "discord_bans" "all" {
  server_id = "123456789012345678"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `server_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the guild.

### Read-Only

- `bans` (Attributes List) Bans of the guild. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--bans))

<a id="nestedatt--bans"></a>
### Nested Schema for `bans`

Read-Only:

- `reason` (String) Reason the user was banned.
- `user_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the banned user.
